spoilers.title: #BCSpoilers Interview with Tabata x Kajiwara Q: Do you ever feel like giving up? K: Plenty of times. T&K both laugh. K: In the Spade arc, when Asta showed weakness too, I started to feel parts of him
spoilers.text: #BCSpoilers Interview with Tabata x Kajiwara Q: Do you ever feel like giving up? K: Plenty of times. T&K both laugh. K: In the Spade arc, when Asta showed weakness too, I started to feel parts of him I hadn't felt at first, and my perspective shifted.

spoilers.title: With this Black Clover Manga comes to an end, It was a great Journey Thank you for all the love and support! Once Anime S2 ends I'll officially step down from Leaks Thank you everyone for your support

misc.title: Black Clover by Yuki Tabata has reached 24.500.000 copies in circulation worldwide with 37 volumes. Series has officially ended with Chapter 392 in Jump GIGA 2026 SPRING, and will be releasing its Fin
misc.text: Black Clover by Yuki Tabata has reached 24.500.000 copies in circulation worldwide with 37 volumes. Series has officially ended with Chapter 392 in Jump GIGA 2026 SPRING, and will be releasing its Final Volume 38 on August 4th, 2026. Shonen Jump News (@WSJ_manga) Black Clover by Yuki Tabata has officially ended with Chapter 392 in Jump GIGA 2026 SPRING. — https://nitter.net/WSJ_manga/status/2048845513680683326#m

misc.title: Kamuoyuna Duyuru Yönetim kurulumuzun yapmış olduğu toplantıda alınan kararlar doğrultusunda; Teknik Direktörümüz Domenico Tedesco ve teknik heyeti ile yollarımız ayrılmıştır. Sportif Direktörümüz Devi
misc.text: Kamuoyuna Duyuru Yönetim kurulumuzun yapmış olduğu toplantıda alınan kararlar doğrultusunda; Teknik Direktörümüz Domenico Tedesco ve teknik heyeti ile yollarımız ayrılmıştır. Sportif Direktörümüz Devin Özek ve Futbol Koordinatörümüz Berke Çelebi ile de yollarımızın ayrılması kararlaştırılmıştır. Kendilerine kulübümüze yaptıkları katkılardan dolayı teşekkür eder; bundan sonraki kariyerlerinde başarılar dileriz. Yardımcı Antrenörümüz Zeki Murat Göle, sezonun kalan maçlarında takımımızın başında sahaya çıkacaktır. Fenerbahçe Spor Kulübü

misc.text: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released a breathtaking view of Antarctica Community note: This image is not from NASA. No such photo was released by Artemis II. It appears to be a computer-generated illustration, similar to past CGI examples falsely claimed as NASA photos. nasa.gov/artemis-ii/ earthobservatory.nasa.gov/images apnews.com/article/Fact-c… — https://nitter.net/astrooalert/status/2048190323495403835#m

items.title: #BCSpoilers Interview with Tabata x Kajiwara Q: Do you ever feel like giving up? K: Plenty of times. T&K both laugh. K: In the Spade arc, when Asta showed weakness too, I started to feel parts of him
items.text: #BCSpoilers Interview with Tabata x Kajiwara Q: Do you ever feel like giving up? K: Plenty of times. T&K both laugh. K: In the Spade arc, when Asta showed weakness too, I started to feel parts of him I hadn't felt at first, and my perspective shifted.
